summary.summary: Syncs the v0.8.3 patch release back to dev. Replacement for #1220 (couldn't push to the head fork because maintainerCanModify was off). Brings: #1219 — Fix delivery-limit regression on silent PumpManagerRawState migration, and release bookkeeping for v0.8.3. Same content as #1220 — single merge commit f3463551d reconciling main (post-0.8.3 release) back into dev.
summary.userFacingImpact: This change includes a fix described as "Fix delivery-limit regression on silent PumpManagerRawState migration" (#1219). The PR and commits do not describe the precise user-visible effects or scope of that fix; human review is recommended to assess user impact and any required release notes or testing.
